title: Stitch fidelity: Dashboard (/dashboard)
description: frontend-agent remediates the Dashboard route only: sidebar, bento grid, and hero per Stitch SoT. Align layout, typography, strokes, shadows, and spacing to projects/todo-reference/design/stitch/screens/11611814ea7a4a2881d76c0c95fd3066.png and matching HTML export; implement with CSS Modules and shared design tokens (no Material). Preserve todo Server Actions integration from prior work.
acceptance: Route /dashboard matches canonical Stitch screen id 11611814ea7a4a2881d76c0c95fd3066: visual and structural parity with projects/todo-reference/design/stitch/screens/11611814ea7a4a2881d76c0c95fd3066.png and projects/todo-reference/design/stitch/code/11611814ea7a4a2881d76c0c95fd3066.html for sidebar, bento, and hero regions.

Section order, hierarchy, and primary affordances match the Dashboard slice in projects/todo-reference/tasks/todo-mvp/07-ui-generator-stitch-four-screens/artifacts/ui_spec.json (no missing or reordered major blocks vs spec).

Styling uses CSS Modules co-located with components and token-driven CSS custom properties from the design-system path; no Material Design components or default Material visual language on this surface.
Dashboard todo workspace remains wired to Server Actions from 05-backend-server-actions-integration; CRUD behavior unchanged aside from presentation fixes required for Stitch parity.
Accessibility: semantic landmarks, labels, and keyboard reachability for interactive controls on this route per ui_spec and prior critique constraints.
100% unit test line coverage maintained for any new or changed pure UI logic in the declared unit scope per architecture-brief and repo coverage config.
Visual acceptance for implementers: downstream QA will assert §4.2 pixel diff vs the canonical PNG at zero diff_ratio; implement to that bar.
implementation_notes: Single-screen scope only; do not bundle fixes for /login, /activity-feed, or /tasks/new in this task.
